validated_commands.format: python3 -m uv run black . && python3 -m uv run isort .
validated_commands.notes: uv is not on PATH in CI; use 'python3 -m uv' instead

testing_backlog.notes: Pre-existing failure: test checks for 'apm install <org/repo>' but Rich adds ANSI bold codes around < and >
Best covered by integration tests due to subprocess complexity

completed_work.description: Added 52 unit tests: core/operations.py (0%->100%, 15 tests), runtime/manager.py (17%->84%, 37 tests). Overall coverage 51%->52%. Tests cover: configure_client, install_package (all shared var combos), uninstall_package; RuntimeManager constructor, get_embedded_script/get_common_script/get_token_helper_script (repo+bundle paths), list_runtimes, is_runtime_available, get_runtime_preference, get_available_runtime, remove_runtime (copilot/binary/llm-venv), setup_runtime.

Added 41 unit tests: registry/operations.py (6%->88%). Overall coverage 51%->52%. Tests cover: init, validate_servers_exist, batch_fetch_server_info, check_servers_needing_installation, _get_installed_server_ids (copilot/codex/vscode runtimes), collect_runtime_variables, collect_environment_variables, _prompt_for_environment_variables (CI/E2E/interactive modes).
Added 37 unit tests: package_validator.py (10%->100%). Also fixed UnboundLocalError bug in get_package_info_summary().
